name: Advance America
description_short: Advance America offers payday loans ($100–$500), installment loans ($100–$1,000), and title loans ($2,000–$25,000) with same-day funding at physical locations and online.
description_long:
Advance America is a nationally recognized lender operating physical storefronts across multiple states, including a Jacksonville, FL location at 1020-14 N. Edgewood Ave. The company has built its reputation on providing fast access to small-dollar loans for consumers facing immediate cash needs between paychecks or during financial emergencies.

Advance America's core offerings include payday loans (2–4 week short-term loans up to $500), installment loans with longer repayment terms and amounts up to $1,000, and title loans secured by vehicle equity ranging from $2,000–$25,000. Loans are available both online and in-store, with the Jacksonville location offering same-day funding capability. The company also provides Western Union services and accepts applications by phone, in person, or online. All loan types require government-issued ID, proof of income, a checking account, and a Social Security Number or ITIN.

Advance America emphasizes customer service and accessibility, highlighting bilingual staff (Spanish-language support advertised) and high customer satisfaction ratings (4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,419 Google reviews as of the profile date). The Jacksonville store maintains extended hours (10 a.m.–6 p.m. weekdays, 9 a.m.–4 p.m. Saturday) to accommodate working consumers. Title loans are offered in partnership with LoanCenter.

As a short-term credit product, Advance America's loans come with the standard caveat that payday and installment loans carry significantly higher interest rates and fees than traditional bank products, making them suitable primarily for genuine financial emergencies rather than long-term borrowing. The company does not advertise interest rates or APR on the website, which is typical for payday lenders but limits transparency. Consumers should carefully review all terms before borrowing, as short-term loans can create debt cycles if used repeatedly.
pros: Same-day funding available for payday and installment loans in-store and online
High customer satisfaction: 4.9 out of 5 stars based on 125,419 verified Google reviews
Flexible loan amounts across three product types ($100–$25,000 range depending on loan type)
Bilingual customer service (Spanish-language support explicitly advertised)
Extended store hours including Saturday (9 a.m.–4 p.m.) and weekday evening hours (until 6 p.m.)
Multiple application methods: online, in-store, or by phone pre-qualification
Installment loans offer longer repayment terms and larger amounts than payday loans alone
Western Union services available at physical location
cons: No interest rates or APR disclosed on website, limiting transparency for borrowers
Payday loans carry inherently high cost and short 2–4 week terms, risking debt cycles
Title loans require vehicle ownership and clear title, creating collateral risk
Installment loans capped at $1,000, inadequate for larger financial emergencies
High reliance on short-term borrowing products rather than payday-alternative or credit-building solutions
best_for: Workers facing unexpected cash shortfalls between paychecks who can repay within 2–4 weeks
Consumers with vehicle equity who need $2,000+ and have no other credit access
Spanish-speaking borrowers in Jacksonville needing same-day emergency funds with bilingual support
Applicants unable to qualify for traditional bank loans due to credit history or income verification requirements
diagnosis: Advance America is best suited for workers with immediate, short-term cash needs ($100–$1,000 range) who can repay within weeks, or consumers with vehicle equity seeking larger emergency loans ($2,000–$25,000). The primary caveat is that payday and installment loans carry high fees and interest rates typical of short-term lenders; these products are genuine emergency tools, not long-term credit solutions, and repeated borrowing can trap consumers in costly debt cycles.
services: Extended store hours including Saturday service

cfpb_data.cfpb_company_name: Advance America, Cash Advance Centers, Inc.
